summary: Backend testing of 4 new features: readiness endpoint math, profile reset (8 collections), and plan_generator new builders + GOAL_DAY_MAPS. All 10 tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 backend features verified: POST /api/readiness returns loadMultiplier+adjustmentPercent with correct thresholds (<3.0 → 0.85/15%, <4.0 → 0.90/10%, >=4.0 → 1.0/0%). GET /api/readiness/today returns both fields. POST /api/profile/reset returns 200 and clears readiness_checks (and all 8 collections). plan_generator.py has _build_re_upper, _build_re_lower, _build_full_body, and GOAL_DAY_MAPS with hypertrophy/athletic performance/general fitness keys.
